lessons.name: Review 4 (Units 10 - 11 - 12)
lessons.description: Review of Units 10, 11, and 12 covering Planet Earth, electronic devices, and career choices.

sections.heading: 1. Language - Vocabulary
sections.content:
Unit 10: Planet Earth

Key vocabulary: planet, Earth, atmosphere, climate, pollution, global warming, deforestation, renewable energy, protect, conserve

Unit 11: Electronic Devices

Key vocabulary: smartphone, tablet, laptop, battery, charger, download, upload, install, update, connect

Unit 12: Career Choices

Key vocabulary: career, doctor, engineer, skill, degree, training, salary, promotion, job opportunity

sections.heading: 2. Language - Grammar
sections.content:
Unit 10: Non-defining Relative Clauses

Structure: Có dấu phẩy, bổ sung thông tin, KHÔNG dùng 'that'

Ex: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.

Unit 11: Suggest/Advise/Recommend

Structure 1: suggest/advise/recommend + V-ing

Structure 2: suggest/advise/recommend + (that) + S + should + V

Unit 12: Adverb Clauses

Concession: although + clause; despite + N/V-ing

Result: so + adj/adv + that; such + (a/an) + adj + N + that

Reason: because + clause; because of + N/V-ing

sections.heading: 3. Skills - Reading Passages
sections.content:
Passage 1: Planet Earth and Technology

The Earth, which is our planet, needs protection. Although pollution is a serious problem, we can solve it. I suggest using renewable energy. I suggest (that) we should reduce plastic waste.

My brother, who is an engineer, designs solar panels. Despite the challenges, he works so hard that he always succeeds. He chose this career because he loves the environment.

Passage 2: Career and Devices

I recommend studying hard. I recommend (that) you should choose a career you love. My friend, whose father is a doctor, wants to be a teacher. She is so dedicated that everyone admires her.

Although technology is useful, we should use it wisely. I advise limiting screen time. Because of electronic devices, communication is easier now.

sections.heading: 4. Skills - Practice
sections.content:
Questions:

  1. What does the Earth need?
  2. What does the writer suggest?
  3. Why did he choose this career?
  4. What should we do with technology?

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Non-defining Relative Clauses
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: Có dấu phẩy, KHÔNG dùng 'that'

examples.question: My brother, ______ lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
examples.solution: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Suggest/Advise/Recommend
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: + V-ing hoặc (that) + S + should + V

examples.question: ______ he is young, he is talented.
examples.solution: Although he is young, he is talented.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Kết hợp tất cả
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: Sử dụng tất cả cấu trúc

examples.question: Kết hợp: My brother lives in Hanoi. He is a teacher. I suggest studying hard. Although it's difficult, he succeeds.
examples.solution: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. I suggest studying hard. Although it's difficult, he succeeds.
examples.explanation: Kết hợp: non-defining, suggest + V-ing, although

exercises.question: My brother, ______ lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
The Earth, ______ is our planet, needs protection.
I suggest ______ a new phone.
I suggest (that) you ______ buy a new phone.
She advises ______ hard.
______ he is young, he is very talented.
______ the rain, we went out.
He is ______ smart that he can solve any problem.
I chose this career ______ I love helping people.
I was late ______ the traffic.
Vietnam, ______ I live, is beautiful.
They recommend ______ the museum.
______ being tired, she continued working.
It was ______ a difficult test that no one passed.
My friend, ______ father is a doctor, lives here.
I advise (that) we ______ study hard.
______ he studied hard, he passed the exam.
She works ______ hard that she always succeeds.
______ his hard work, he succeeded.
Ha Long Bay, ______ is in Vietnam, is beautiful.
Which are non-defining relative clauses? (Select all that apply)
options: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
The student who studies hard will pass.
Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful.
The book that I read was good.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: có dấu phẩy (non-defining). Sai: không có dấu phẩy (defining)

exercises.question: Which are correct structures with suggest? (Select all that apply)
options: I suggest to buy a phone.
I suggest (that) you should buy a phone.
I suggest you buy a phone.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: suggest + V-ing, suggest + (that) + S + should + V. Sai: suggest + to V, suggest + S + V (thiếu 'should')

exercises.question: Which show concession? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Nhượng bộ: although, despite. because (lý do), so (kết quả)

exercises.question: Fill in: My brother, ______ lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
Fill in: I suggest ______ (buy) a new phone.
Fill in: ______ he is young, he is talented.
Transform: Although it rained, we went out. → ______ the rain, we went out.
Rearrange: brother / My / who / lives / in / Hanoi / is / teacher / a / . / suggest / I / buying / phone / new / a / .
exercises.sample_answer: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. I suggest buying a new phone.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: non-defining clause; suggest + V-ing

exercises.question: Transform: I suggest buying a new phone. → I suggest (that) you ______.
exercises.sample_answer: I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: buying → (that) you should buy

exercises.question: Transform: Although it rained, we went out. + Because the traffic was heavy, I was late. → Use 'despite' and 'because of'
exercises.sample_answer: Despite the rain, we went out. Because of the heavy traffic, I was late.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: although → despite; because → because of

exercises.question: Rearrange: Although / he / is / young / , / he / is / talented / . / so / He / is / smart / that / can / he / solve / problems / .
exercises.sample_answer: Although he is young, he is talented. He is so smart that he can solve problems.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: although + clause; so + adj + that

exercises.question: Combine all grammar: My brother lives in Hanoi. He is a teacher. I suggest studying hard. Although it's difficult, he works so hard that he succeeds. He chose this career because he loves it. (Use non-defining clause, suggest + V-ing, although, so...that, because)
exercises.sample_answer: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. I suggest studying hard. Although it's difficult, he works so hard that he succeeds. He chose this career because he loves it.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp: non-defining (who), suggest + V-ing, although (concession), so...that (result), because (reason)
